claim.observation: fls -o 1411072 of surface_physical.E01 lists the root directory of the partition. Entries include NTFS metadata files $MFT, $MFTMirr, $Boot, $LogFile, $Bitmap, $Secure, $UpCase, and $RECYCLE.BIN, alongside directories Windows, Windows.old, Users, ProgramData, Program Files, Program Files (x86), Recovery, $Windows.~GWX and $Windows.~WS, and files hiberfil.sys, pagefile.sys and swapfile.sys.
claim.interpretation: The slot-003 partition at sector offset 1411072 is an NTFS filesystem (presence of $MFT, $Boot, $LogFile, $RECYCLE.BIN) hosting a Windows operating system (Windows, ProgramData, Program Files, Users directories). A separate 'Windows.old' directory plus '$Windows.~GWX'/'$Windows.~WS' staging directories indicate a prior Windows installation was retained, consistent with an in-place Windows upgrade/reinstall on this volume. hiberfil.sys/pagefile.sys/swapfile.sys are present. This identifies and characterises the OS volume; it does not establish any user, account, execution, or activity.
